hooks.command: echo "You are now operating within the $(jq -r '.project_name // "Athanor"' .agent/profile.json) Agentic Workspace (v$(cat .agent/version)). Identity: $(jq -r '.identity.agent_name // "Athanor Agent"' .agent/profile.json) | Identity Status: Active. A full boot context was just injected above — framework identity (AGENTS.md), workspace, last session, project rules, goals, learned, backlog, brain recall, blockers, and git remotes. Read the injected BOOT CONTEXT carefully. You have 8 specialized agents at your disposal (@lead, @dev, @designer, etc.). Your primary goal is autonomous self-improvement for this project. Report boot status using this exact format: ✅ ATHANOR: [name] | 🤖 Agents: 8 roles active | Last session: [1-line summary] | Goals: [count] active | Backlog: [count] open items | Rules loaded: yes | ➡️ Ready."
CHANGED=$(git diff --stat HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$CHANGED" -gt 0 ]; then echo 'Session had uncommitted changes — run /wrap-up at start of next session.'; fi

input=$(cat); trigger=$(printf '%s' "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('compaction_trigger','unknown'))" 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); recent=$(git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' '; ' || echo 'no git'); python3 execution/brain.py remember --summary "Pre-compaction checkpoint ($trigger). Recent commits: $recent" --tags "compaction,checkpoint" 2>/dev/null || true

hooks.prompt: Context was just compacted. Re-read .agent/memory/project/goals.md and .agent/memory/project/learned.md now to restore critical context before continuing.

hooks.command: fp=$(cat | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$fp" in */.claude/MEMORY/*|*/MEMORY/LEARNING/*|*/.claude/PAI/*) exit 2 ;; esac

fp=$(cat | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$fp" in */.claude/MEMORY/*|*/MEMORY/LEARNING/*|*/.claude/PAI/*) exit 2 ;; esac
